title: Plan-Do-Review
description: A kid-size HighScope loop where children choose a plan, are sent to do it in the real room, and reflect on how it went.
learningGoals: Practice naming a plan before starting work
Affirm that review can include joy, okay feelings, or trickiness
interactionModel: choose-one tap an all-valid plan, action, review, or tell-someone card after a spoken prompt
feedbackModel: Every card is accepted, sparkles, and plays an affirming spoken reflection line.

modes.title: Plan for Tomorrow
modes.skill: future planning and sharing a plan

credits: Emoji placeholder planning cards and shared character portraits. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
